name: Laredo Oil, Inc.
summary: PART I We were incorporated under the laws of the State of Delaware on March 31, 2008 under the name of Laredo Mining, Inc. As of that date, we had 90,000,000 authorized shares of common stock at $0.0001 par value and 10,000,000 authorized shares of preferred stock at $0.0001 par value. On October 21, 2009 our name was changed to Laredo Oil, Inc.
